owner.websitePurpose: Website created by Nguyen Trong Nghia as a gift for Hoang Dinh Hai Anh on International Women's Day (March 8)

partner.address: Chi hoi Pho Moi, 129 Thi Tran Me, Gia Vien, Ninh Binh

family.bopNotes: Bop draws very well and really likes drawing

narrativeForAI: Toi la Nguyen Trong Nghia, sinh ngay 05/08/2003, dev cua HIPT va la nguoi code website nay de tang Hoang Dinh Hai Anh vao ngay 8/3. Hai Anh sinh ngay 07/08/2004, hien hoc Ajou University va dang song o Suwon, con toi dang song o Ha Noi. Chung toi bat dau ket noi tren Facebook, moc ket ban 17/06/2022 va lay ngay 01/06/2025 lam ngay yeu. Day la tinh yeu xa nhung luon gan bo, chung thuy va rat yeu nhau.
